<a id="class-textureprogressbar"></a>

# TextureProgressBar

**Inherits:** [Range](class_range.md#class-range) **<** [Control](class_control.md#class-control) **<** [CanvasItem](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Texture-based progress bar. Useful for loading screens and life or stamina bars.

## Description

TextureProgressBar works like [ProgressBar](class_progressbar.md#class-progressbar), but uses up to 3 textures instead of Godot's [Theme](class_theme.md#class-theme) resource. It can be used to create horizontal, vertical and radial progress bars.

## Enumerations

<a id="enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode"></a>

enum **FillMode**: [🔗](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode)

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-left-to-right"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_LEFT_TO_RIGHT** = `0`

The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills from left to right.

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-right-to-left"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_RIGHT_TO_LEFT** = `1`

The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills from right to left.

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-top-to-bottom"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_TOP_TO_BOTTOM** = `2`

The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills from top to bottom.

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-bottom-to-top"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_BOTTOM_TO_TOP** = `3`

The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills from bottom to top.

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-clockwise"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_CLOCKWISE** = `4`

Turns the node into a radial bar. The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills clockwise. See [radial_center_offset](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-center-offset), [radial_initial_angle](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-initial-angle) and [radial_fill_degrees](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-fill-degrees) to control the way the bar fills up.

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-counter-clockwise"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE** = `5`

Turns the node into a radial bar. The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills counterclockwise. See [radial_center_offset](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-center-offset), [radial_initial_angle](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-initial-angle) and [radial_fill_degrees](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-fill-degrees) to control the way the bar fills up.

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-bilinear-left-and-right"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_BILINEAR_LEFT_AND_RIGHT** = `6`

The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills from the center, expanding both towards the left and the right.

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-bilinear-top-and-bottom"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_BILINEAR_TOP_AND_BOTTOM** = `7`

The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills from the center, expanding both towards the top and the bottom.

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-clockwise-and-counter-clockwise"></a>

[FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) **FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE** = `8`

Turns the node into a radial bar. The [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) fills radially from the center, expanding both clockwise and counterclockwise. See [radial_center_offset](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-center-offset), [radial_initial_angle](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-initial-angle) and [radial_fill_degrees](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-fill-degrees) to control the way the bar fills up.

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-fill-mode"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **fill_mode** = `0` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-fill-mode)

-  **set_fill_mode**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_fill_mode**()

The fill direction. See [FillMode](#enum-textureprogressbar-fillmode) for possible values.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-nine-patch-stretch"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **nine_patch_stretch** = `false` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-nine-patch-stretch)

-  **set_nine_patch_stretch**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_nine_patch_stretch**()

If `true`, Godot treats the bar's textures like in [NinePatchRect](class_ninepatchrect.md#class-ninepatchrect). Use the `stretch_margin_*` properties like [stretch_margin_bottom](#class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-bottom) to set up the nine patch's 3×3 grid. When using a radial [fill_mode](#class-textureprogressbar-property-fill-mode), this setting will only enable stretching for [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress), while [texture_under](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-under) and [texture_over](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-over) will be treated like in [NinePatchRect](class_ninepatchrect.md#class-ninepatchrect).

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-center-offset"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **radial_center_offset** = `Vector2(0, 0)` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-center-offset)

-  **set_radial_center_offset**(value: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2))
- [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_radial_center_offset**()

Offsets [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) if [fill_mode](#class-textureprogressbar-property-fill-mode) is [FILL_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-clockwise), [FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-counter-clockwise), or [FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-clockwise-and-counter-clockwise).

**Note:** The effective radial center always stays within the [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) bounds. If you need to move it outside the texture's bounds, modify the [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) to contain additional empty space where needed.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-fill-degrees"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **radial_fill_degrees** = `360.0` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-fill-degrees)

-  **set_fill_degrees**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_fill_degrees**()

Upper limit for the fill of [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) if [fill_mode](#class-textureprogressbar-property-fill-mode) is [FILL_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-clockwise), [FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-counter-clockwise), or [FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-clockwise-and-counter-clockwise). When the node's `value` is equal to its `max_value`, the texture fills up to this angle.

See [Range.value](class_range.md#class-range-property-value), [Range.max_value](class_range.md#class-range-property-max-value).

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-initial-angle"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **radial_initial_angle** = `0.0` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-initial-angle)

-  **set_radial_initial_angle**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_radial_initial_angle**()

Starting angle for the fill of [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) if [fill_mode](#class-textureprogressbar-property-fill-mode) is [FILL_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-clockwise), [FILL_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-counter-clockwise), or [FILL_CLOCKWISE_AND_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE](#class-textureprogressbar-constant-fill-clockwise-and-counter-clockwise). When the node's `value` is equal to its `min_value`, the texture doesn't show up at all. When the `value` increases, the texture fills and tends towards [radial_fill_degrees](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-fill-degrees).

**Note:** [radial_initial_angle](#class-textureprogressbar-property-radial-initial-angle) is wrapped between `0` and `360` degrees (inclusive).

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-bottom"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **stretch_margin_bottom** = `0` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-bottom)

-  **set_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side), value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side)) 

The height of the 9-patch's bottom row. A margin of 16 means the 9-slice's bottom corners and side will have a height of 16 pixels. You can set all 4 margin values individually to create panels with non-uniform borders. Only effective if [nine_patch_stretch](#class-textureprogressbar-property-nine-patch-stretch) is `true`.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-left"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **stretch_margin_left** = `0` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-left)

-  **set_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side), value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side)) 

The width of the 9-patch's left column. Only effective if [nine_patch_stretch](#class-textureprogressbar-property-nine-patch-stretch) is `true`.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-right"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **stretch_margin_right** = `0` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-right)

-  **set_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side), value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side)) 

The width of the 9-patch's right column. Only effective if [nine_patch_stretch](#class-textureprogressbar-property-nine-patch-stretch) is `true`.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-top"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **stretch_margin_top** = `0` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-stretch-margin-top)

-  **set_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side), value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side)) 

The height of the 9-patch's top row. Only effective if [nine_patch_stretch](#class-textureprogressbar-property-nine-patch-stretch) is `true`.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-over"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **texture_over** [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-over)

-  **set_over_texture**(value: [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d))
- [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **get_over_texture**()

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) that draws over the progress bar. Use it to add highlights or an upper-frame that hides part of [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress).

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **texture_progress** [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress)

-  **set_progress_texture**(value: [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d))
- [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **get_progress_texture**()

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) that clips based on the node's `value` and [fill_mode](#class-textureprogressbar-property-fill-mode). As `value` increased, the texture fills up. It shows entirely when `value` reaches `max_value`. It doesn't show at all if `value` is equal to `min_value`.

The `value` property comes from [Range](class_range.md#class-range). See [Range.value](class_range.md#class-range-property-value), [Range.min_value](class_range.md#class-range-property-min-value), [Range.max_value](class_range.md#class-range-property-max-value).

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress-offset"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **texture_progress_offset** = `Vector2(0, 0)` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress-offset)

-  **set_texture_progress_offset**(value: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2))
- [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_texture_progress_offset**()

The offset of [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress). Useful for [texture_over](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-over) and [texture_under](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-under) with fancy borders, to avoid transparent margins in your progress texture.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-under"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **texture_under** [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-under)

-  **set_under_texture**(value: [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d))
- [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **get_under_texture**()

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) that draws under the progress bar. The bar's background.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-tint-over"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **tint_over** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 1)` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-tint-over)

-  **set_tint_over**(value: [Color](class_color.md#class-color))
- [Color](class_color.md#class-color) **get_tint_over**()

Multiplies the color of the bar's [texture_over](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-over) texture. The effect is similar to [CanvasItem.modulate](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem-property-modulate), except it only affects this specific texture instead of the entire node.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-tint-progress"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **tint_progress** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 1)` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-tint-progress)

-  **set_tint_progress**(value: [Color](class_color.md#class-color))
- [Color](class_color.md#class-color) **get_tint_progress**()

Multiplies the color of the bar's [texture_progress](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-progress) texture.

---

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-property-tint-under"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **tint_under** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 1)` [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-property-tint-under)

-  **set_tint_under**(value: [Color](class_color.md#class-color))
- [Color](class_color.md#class-color) **get_tint_under**()

Multiplies the color of the bar's [texture_under](#class-textureprogressbar-property-texture-under) texture.

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-textureprogressbar-method-get-stretch-margin"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_stretch_margin**(margin: [Side](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-side))  [🔗](#class-textureprogressbar-method-get-stretch-margin)
